detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.Collect(uint256) (ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.sol#81-105):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.sol#93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.sol#97)
	ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.balances (ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.Collect(uint256) (ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.sol#81-105)
	- ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.Deposit() (ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.sol#65-77)
	- ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.balances (ACCURAL_DEPOSIT.sol#9)
